title: Tech Layoffs 2026: 45,000 Jobs Lost and AI Is Just Getting Started
author: Howard
excerpt: Tech industry layoffs reach 45,000 in 2026 with over 9,200 jobs directly linked to AI automation. Amazon, Meta, and others cut deep as automation transforms the workforce.

image_prompts.hero: Dramatic corporate layoff scene with employees leaving tech office building with boxes, AI robot silhouette in background, somber mood, modern glass office building, overcast sky
image_prompts.inline: Abstract visualization of AI automation replacing human workers, robotic hands and human hands reaching toward each other, transformation concept, dramatic lighting
